zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Cheyne於1384年出生在英國肯特易亞斯丘其時，她的父親Richard Cheyne31歲，母親Margaret de Cralle29歲。她於大約1404年與James Donnet結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年在英國肯特萊音哈姆享年36歲，埋葬在英國肯特萊音哈姆聖 馬加也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Cheyne was born in 1384, in Eastchurch, Kent, England, her father, Richard Cheyne, was 31 and her mother, Margaret de Cralle, was 29. She married James Donnet about 1404. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1420, in Rainham, Kent, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in St Margaret's Church, Rainham, Kent, England.

Elle a épousé James Donnet environ 1404. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Rainham, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à St Margaret's Church, Rainham, Kent, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Cheyne(이)가 1384년 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Cheyne(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Cralle(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1404년 James Donnet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 켄트 레이함에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 레이함 스트 마가트'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Cheyne nasceu em 1384, em Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Cheyne, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Cralle, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com James Donnet aproximadamente 1404. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1420, em Rainham, Kent, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em St Margaret's Church, Rainham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Cheyne родилась в 1384 г. в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Cheyne было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Cralle, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Donnet около 1404 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности реинам, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности ст маргарет'с чурч, реинам, кэнт, Англия.
